name: part_000
file: tmp_【#兎田ぺこら6周年記念LIVE】周年3D LIVE！ぺこらRUSH！！！！！！！ぺこ！【ホロライブ⧸兎田ぺこら】 [E2D_YFRHFG8]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_000.webm

scenes.description: Opening teaser animation showcasing Usada Pekora's past moments and the 6th-anniversary theme.
Usada Pekora performs on stage in a yukata-style outfit.
scenes.song_name: そこにあるかも知れない (Soko ni aru kamo shirenai)

subtitles.original: USADA PEKORA 周年3D LIVE ぺこらRUSH！！！
subtitles.english: USADA PEKORA Anniversary 3D LIVE: Pekora RUSH!!!

subtitles.original:
※この配信は演出により激しく点滅する場面がございます
部屋を明るくし画面から十分離れてご視聴ください
subtitles.english:
*This broadcast contains scenes with intense flashing lights due to the staging.
Please watch in a well-lit room and stay a sufficient distance from the screen.
